info.name: Local Service Marketplace - All Services
info.description:
Complete API documentation for all microservices including the API Gateway.

**Base URL (via API Gateway):** `{{base_url}}` = `http://localhost:3700/api/v1`

**Auth:** Most endpoints require a Bearer JWT token. Use the Login request and the collection will auto-save the token.

**Services & Direct Ports:**
- api-gateway: 3700
- identity-service: 3001
- marketplace-service: 3003
- payment-service: 3006
- comms-service: 3007
- oversight-service: 3010

Active session and trusted device management.

Ã¢Å¡Â Ã¯Â¸Â FUTURE FEATURE Ã¢â‚¬â€ Routes not yet implemented. Sessions table exists in auth-service DB schema.

item.name: Ã°Å¸â€™Â¼ Auth Ã¢â‚¬â€ Account Management
item.description:
Account security and lifecycle management.

Ã¢Å¡Â Ã¯Â¸Â FUTURE FEATURE Ã¢â‚¬â€ Routes not yet implemented.

- Change password requires current password verification
- Account deletion should be soft-delete with 30-day grace period

item.name: Ã°Å¸â€â€” Auth Ã¢â‚¬â€ Social Account Linking
item.description:
Link/unlink social providers to an existing account (separate from OAuth login).

Ã¢Å¡Â Ã¯Â¸Â FUTURE FEATURE Ã¢â‚¬â€ Routes not yet implemented. `social_accounts` table already exists in the DB schema.

Allows one user to have both email/password AND Google/Facebook auth.

item.name: Ã°Å¸Âªâ€ž Auth Ã¢â‚¬â€ Magic Link (Passwordless)
item.description:
Email-based passwordless login via one-time magic links.

Ã¢Å¡Â Ã¯Â¸Â FUTURE FEATURE Ã¢â‚¬â€ Routes not yet implemented.

Flow: user enters email Ã¢â€ â€™ receives email with link Ã¢â€ â€™ clicks link Ã¢â€ â€™ gets JWT token.
